sum: This mod features three components: one for paying to rest, one for keeping your gold between games, and one that redefines the time-stopping mechanic.
no: This mod features three components: one for paying to rest, one for keeping your gold between games, and one that redefines the time-stopping mechanic.

co.g: Pay gold to rest based on elapsed time
